name: Seagate Technology Holdings plc
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc is a leading provider of data storage technology and infrastructure solutions. Its principal products are hard disk drives (HDDs), along with solid state drives (SSDs), storage subsystems, and the Lyve platform—a scalable edge-to-cloud mass data platform offering data transfer shuttles and storage-as-a-service. Seagate designs and manufactures key HDD components including read/write heads and recording media, serving cloud, enterprise, and legacy consumer markets.
